title: Captain Underpants and the Terrifying Return of Tippy Tinkletrousers
titleZh: 内裤队长与蒂皮·叮当裤的恐怖回归
author: Dav Pilkey
desc: Tippy Tinkletrousers returns in a giant Robo-Suit for revenge!

q.en: At the start of the book, why are George and Harold being taken to jail?
q.zh: 故事开头，乔治和哈罗德为什么会被带去坐牢？

options.zh: 他们偷走了紫色马桶（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

options.en: Police think they robbed a bank with Captain Underpants
options.zh: 警察以为他们和内裤队长一起抢了银行
他们催眠了克拉普先生

explain.en: Surveillance photos showed the boys 'robbing a bank with Captain Underpants,' but it was really their evil twins from another dimension who did it.
explain.zh: 监控照片显示两个男孩“和内裤队长一起抢银行”，但其实干这事的是另一个维度的邪恶双胞胎。

q.en: What is the name of the time-travel danger explained with a banana cream pie?
q.zh: 书中用香蕉奶油派解释的那种时光旅行危险叫什么？

options.zh: 紫色马桶悖论（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: The 'Banana Cream Pie Paradox' shows how one small change in the past (a pie in a face) can snowball and change the future, even destroying the planet.
explain.zh: “香蕉奶油派悖论”说明过去一个小小的改变（脸上被砸了一派）会像滚雪球一样改变未来，甚至毁掉整个地球。

q.en: Before calling himself Tippy Tinkletrousers, what was this villain's earlier name?
q.zh: 在自称“蒂皮·叮当裤”之前，这个反派原本叫什么？

options.zh: 梅尔文·斯尼德利（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: Mr. Krupp recognizes him: 'You're that Professor Poopypants guy.' Tippy replies that was a ridiculous name, so he changed it to Tippy Tinkletrousers.
explain.zh: 克拉普先生认出了他：“你就是那个 poopypants 教授。”蒂皮说那名字太傻了，所以改成了“蒂皮·叮当裤”。

q.en: What is the name of Tippy's freezing weapon?
q.zh: 蒂皮那件能让人冻住的武器叫什么？

options.zh: 激光机2000（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: Tippy's Robo-Suit fires the Freezy-Beam 4000, which temporarily freezes whatever it zaps for as long as he chooses.
explain.zh: 蒂皮的机器人战衣发射“冰冻射线4000”，能把他照到的人或物按他设定的时长冻住。

q.en: At the Juvenile Detention Center, how does Mr. Krupp turn into Captain Underpants?
q.zh: 在少年管教所，克拉普先生是怎么变回内裤队长的？

options.en: George and Harold snap their fingers
options.zh: 乔治和哈罗德打了个响指

explain.en: Almost without thinking, George and Harold reached out and snapped their fingers, and Mr. Krupp transformed into Captain Underpants.
explain.zh: 乔治和哈罗德几乎不假思索地伸手打了个响指，克拉普先生当场变成了内裤队长。

q.en: Where does Captain Underpants go to get a cape?
q.zh: 内裤队长去哪里弄到了他的披风？

options.en: A shopping center having a cape sale
options.zh: 一家正在卖披风的购物中心
学校图书馆（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: Captain Underpants flew to a nearby shopping center (having its Semiannual Lazy Storytelling Sale) and found a cape in aisle thirty-nine.
explain.zh: 内裤队长飞到附近一家购物中心（正在搞“半年一度懒人讲故事大减价”），在第39排货架找到了披风。

q.en: In the flashback, who is the biggest bully at Jerome Horwitz Elementary who steals Harold's lunch money?
q.zh: 在回忆里，杰罗姆·霍维茨小学里抢走哈罗德午餐钱的头号恶霸是谁？

options.zh: 芬克斯坦（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: Kipper Krupp was the biggest, meanest kid and nephew of the principal; every day he and his friends stole lunch money from the kindergartners.
explain.zh: 基珀·克拉普是最凶的大孩子，也是校长的侄子；他天天带着跟班抢幼儿园小孩的午餐钱。

q.en: What does George change the gas station sign to say, causing an uproar?
q.zh: 乔治把加油站的牌子改成了什么，从而引发了一场骚动？

explain.en: George removed the letters 'k' and 'e' from 'BRAKE,' turning 'FREE BRAKE INSPECTION' into 'FREE BRA INSPECTION,' which made angry women protest.
explain.zh: 乔治把“刹车(brake)”里的 k 和 e 拿掉，招牌变成“免费胸罩(bra)检查”，气得一群女士当场抗议。

q.en: In the 'real' ending of the last adventure, how long were George, Harold, and Mr. Krupp sentenced to prison?
q.zh: 在“真正”的结局里，乔治、哈罗德和克拉普先生各被判了多少年监禁？

explain.en: Without Tippy's interruption, the three were found guilty and each sentenced to ten years in the Piqua State Penitentiary.
explain.zh: 如果没有蒂皮插手，三人会被判有罪，各被判十年，关进皮夸州立监狱。

q.en: After Captain Underpants splits his Robo-Suit in two, what does Tippy escape in?
q.zh: 内裤队长把机器人战衣扯成两半后，蒂皮逃进了哪一半？

options.zh: 紫色马桶（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）
机器人裤（下半身，也是时光机）

explain.en: Tippy ducked into the lower half — the Robo-Pants, which is also a time machine — and set the Tinkle-Time Travelometer to 'Five Years Ago.'
explain.zh: 蒂皮钻进下半身——也就是机器人裤（本身也是时光机），把“叮当时光旅行仪”设成了“五年前”。
